welcome_email_intro: Thanks for joining CartForge! Your account is ready. Discover the latest tech, fashion and home essentials, all in one place.
welcome_email_gift_title: A gift to get you started
welcome_email_gift_text: Use the code below at checkout for 10% off your first order.
welcome_email_footer: You're receiving this email because you created a CartForge account.
login_code.subject: Your CartForge login code
login_code.intro: Use the code below to confirm it's really you and finish signing in.
login_code.ignore: If you didn't try to sign in, you can safely ignore this email.
login_code.page_subheading: We sent a 6-digit code to :email. Enter it below to continue.
login_code.invalid: The code is incorrect or has expired.
login_code.sent: We sent a 6-digit code to your email.
login_code.resent: We sent a new code to your email.
login.not_registered: We couldn't find an account with that email. Please register first.

Once your account is deleted, all of its: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Before deleting your account, please download any data or information that you wish to retain.

Thanks for signing up! Before getting st: Thanks for signing up! Before getting started, could you verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you? If you didn't receive the email, we will gladly send you another.

Forgot your password? No problem. Just l: Forgot your password? No problem. Just let us know your email address and we will email you a password reset link that will allow you to choose a new one.
